text: polos shalicha meqora shel-yeshu'a hamashicha biretson elohim vesosetenis achinu
el-qehilat elohim asher beqorinetos lamequdashim bamashicha yeshu'a haqedshim haqeruim 'im kal-haqoreim beshem adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha bekhal-maqom shelahem veshelanu
chesed lakhem veshalom meet haelohim avinu vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
ode lelohay ba'avurekhem bekhal-'et 'al-chesed haelohim hanitan lakhem bamashicha yeshu'a
asher 'asharetem-bo bakol bedibur uveda'at
baasher 'edut hamashicha hitechazeqa vakhem
'ad asher-lo chasaretem kal-matan hechased vehinekhem mechakim lehitegalut adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
vehu gam-yekhonen etekhem 'ad-'et qets liheyot neqiyim beyom adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
neeman haelohim asher 'al-piv niqeretem lecheverat beno yeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu
vehineni mazehir etekhem achay beshem adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha liheyot kulekhem pe echad velo tiheyeyna machaloqot beyneykhem ki im-tikonanu yachad belev echad uve'etsa echat
ki beney-veyt keloa higidu li 'aleykhem echay ki merivot beyneykhem
vezot ani omer mipeney sheish ish mikem omer ani lefolos vaani leapolos vaani lekheyfa vaani lamashicha hineni
hakhi chulaq hamashicha hakhi folos nitselav ba'adekhem im leshem polos nitebaletem
ode lelohim shel tavaleti ish mikem bileti qerisepos vegayos
pen-yomeru ki-lishemi tavaleti
vetavaleti gam et-beney-veyt isetefanos umilevad ele lo eda' im-tavaleti ish acher
ki lo shelachani hamashicha litebol ki im-levaser lo-vechakhemat devarim lema'an asher lo-yiheye tseluv hamashicha lariq
ki-devar hatseluv sikhelut hu laovedim aval lanu hanosha'im gevurat elohim
ki-khen katuv aabed chakhemat chakhamim uvinat nevonim asetir
aye chakham aye sofer aye doresh ha'olam haze halo sikel haolohim et-chakhemat ha'olam haze
ki acharey asher bechakhemat haelohim lo yada' ha'olam et-haelohim bechakhema haya ratson milefanayv lehoshi'a besikhelut haqeria et hamaaminim
ki hayehudim shoalim lahem ot vehayevanim mevaqeshim chakhema
vaanachenu mashemi'im et-hamashicha hatsaluv mikheshol layehudim vesikhelut layevanim
aval lameqoraim beyn mihudim beyn mivanim et-hamashicha asher hu gevurat elohim vechakhemat elohim
ya'an ki sikhelut hael chakhama hi meadam vechuleshat hael chazaqa hi meadam
ki reu-na achay et-qeriatekhem shel rabim hachakhamim min-habasar lo rabim hashalitim lo rabim ramey hayachas
ki im-basakhal sheba'olam bachar hael lema'an bayesh et-hachakhamim uvechalush sheba'olam bachar hael lema'an bayesh et-hechazaq
uvedalat ha'olam bachar hael uvanimeas uvaasher keayin lema'an batel et asher yesheno
kedey shel-yitehalel lefanayv kal-basar
umimenu atem bamashicha yeshu'a asher haya lanu lechakhema meet haelohim velitsedaqa veliqedusha ulefideyom
vihi kakatuv hamitehalel yitehalel bayeho
vegam anokhi bevoi aleykhem achay lo vati begeut hadibur vehachakhema lehagid lakhem et-'edut haelohim
ki lo-amareti lada'at betokhakhem davar bileti im-yeshu'a hamashicha vehu hanitselav
vaehi 'imakhem bechulesha uveyirea uvechalechala raba
udevari uqeriati lo lefatot beimerey chakhemat beney-adam ki im-betokhachat harucha vehagevura
lema'an asher lo-tiheye emunatekhem bechakhemat beney adam ki im-bigevurat elohim
aval chakhema anachenu medaberim beqerev hashelemim lo chakhemat ha'olam haze gam-lo shel-sarey ha'olam haze asher yovedu
ki im-nedaber basod chakhemat haelohim hanisetara asher haelohim ye'adah likhevodenu lifeney yemot 'olam
asher lo yeda'ah ish misarey ha'olam haze ki ilu yeda'uha lo tsalevu et-adon hakavod
ki im-kakatuv asher-'ayin lo raata veozen lo shame'a velo 'ala 'al-lev adam et asher-hekhin haelohim leohavayv
velanu gila haelohim berucho ki harucha choqer et-hakol gam et-ma'amaqey haelohim
ki mi hu mibeney adam yode'a et asher baadam ki im-rucha haadam asher beqirebo vekhen eyn ish yode'a et asher belohim ki im-rucha haelohim
vaanachenu lo laqachenu et-rucha ha'olam ki im-harucha meet haelohim lema'an neda' et-asher nitan lanu meet haelohim bechasedo
veet-zot lo notsi belashon asher telamed chakhemat beney adam ki im-belashon asher rucha haqodesh telamed unevaer ruchaniot bidevarim ruchanim
hen haadam hative'i eynenu meqabel et-diverey rucha elohim ki-hema sikhelut lo velo yukhal lahavinam baasher hema nedonim bederekh harucha
aval haadam haruchani yadin hakol veoto lo-yadin ish
ki mi-tiken et-rucha yeho umi yodi'enu vaanachenu hine yesh-lanu rucha hamashicha
vaani lo yakholeti ledaber 'imakhem achay kedaber 'im aneshey rucha ki im kedaber 'im aneshey vasar kedaber 'im 'olalim bamashicha
chalav hisheqeyti etekhem velo-maakhal ki 'adayin lo heyitem yekholim vegam-'ata eynekhem yekholim ki 'odekhem shel-habasar
ki baasher qinea beyneykhem umeriva umachaloqot halo shel-habasar atem venohagim minehag beney adam
hen beemor ze ani lefolos veze ani leapolos halo shel-habasar atem
mi efo folos umi-hu apolos akhe-mesharatim asher 'al-yadam batem lehaamin ish ish kematenat haadon asher natan lo
ani nata'eti veapolos hisheqa vehaelohim hu hitsemicha
'al-ken hanote'a keayin vehamasheqe keayin ki im-elohim hamatsemicha
vehanote'a vehamasheqe keechad hema vekhal-ish yeqabel et-sekharo kefi 'amalo
ki 'ozerim lelohim bimelakheto anachenu sede elohim atem bineyan elohim atem
vaani kefi chesed elohim hanitan li keaman chakham shati yesod veacher bone 'alayv akhe-yere khal-ish eykh hu-vone 'alayv
ki lo-yukhal ish lashit yesod acher zulati hamusad shehu yeshu'a hamashicha
veim-yivene habone 'al-hayesod haze zahav o khesef o avanim yeqarot o-'ets o chatsir o qash
yigale ma'ase khal-ish ki-hayom hu yevararehu ki-vaesh yerae umah-ma'ase kal-ish vaish haesh tivechanenu
im-ya'amod ma'ase ish asher bana 'alayv yeqabel sekharo
veim-yisaref ma'asehu yafesidenu vehu yivashe'a akh keud mutsal meesh
halo yeda'etem ki heykhal elohim atem verucha elohim shokhen beqirebekhem
veish asher yashechit et-heykhal elohim haelohim yashechit oto ki heykhal elohim qadosh veatem heykhalo
al-yasi ish nafesho mi asher chakham yechashev ba'olam haze yehi lesakhal lema'an yechekam
ki-chakhemat ha'olam haze sikhelut lifeney haelohim kakatuv lokhed chakhamim be'aremam
ve'od katuv yeho yode'a macheshevot chakhamim ki hema havel
'al-ken al-yitehalel ish beadam ki hakol hu shelakhem
im-polos im-apolos veim-keyfa im-ha'olam im-hachayim veim-hamavet im-haho veim-he'atid hakol hu shelakhem
veatem shel-hamashicha vehamashicha shel-elohim
kimesharatey hamashicha vesokheney razey el ken yachashav-ish otanu
velaze 'od yevuqash min-hasokhenim lehimatse neeman
vaani neqala hi be'eynay sheatem danim oti o-yom din shel-beney adam gam-ani lo adin nafeshi
ki eyneni yode'a benafeshi meuma ra' uvekhal-zot lo etsedaq ki haadon hu hadan oti
'al-ken al-tishepetu davar lifeney 'ito 'ad ki-yavo haadon vehu yotsi laor et-ta'alumot hachshekh vigale et-mezimot halevavot veaz tiheye tehila lekhal-ish meet haelohim
veet-zot achay hasiboti 'al-'atsemi ve'al-apolos ba'avurekhem lema'an tilemedu vanu shel-yitegadel ish 'al-mah-shekatuv pen-titegau ish beshem ish leneged re'ehu
ki mi hifeli otekha ume veyadekha velo nitan lakh veim-nitan leekha lama titehalel kemi shel nitan lo
hen kevar sevaa'etem kevar 'asharetem uvile'adeynu melakhetem velu melakhetem lema'an nimelokh itekhem gam-anachenu
ki omer ani shehaelohim hitsig otanu hashelichim shifeley hashefalim kiveney-temuta ki hayinu leraava la'olam gam-lamaleakhim gam-liveney adam
anachenu sekhalim lema'an hamashicha veatem chakhamim bamashicha anachenu chalashim veatem giborim atem nikhebadim vaanachenu niqelim
ve'ad-hasha'a hazot hinenu re'evim gam-tsemeim va'arumim umukim beegerof veeyn manocha lanu
vige'im anachenu ba'amal yadeynu meqalelim otanu unevarekh mecharefim otanu venisebol
gidefu otanu venitechanan vanehi kegelaley ha'olam velisechi lekhulam 'ad-hayom haze
velo khataveti hadevarim haele levayesh etekhem ki im-mazehir ani etekhem kevanay haahuvim
ki gam-im-hayu lakhem rivavot omenim bamashicha eyn lakhem avot rabim ki anokhi yaladeti etekhem beyeshu'a hamashicha 'al-yedey habesora
'al-ken ani mevaqesh mikem lalekhet be'iqevotay
uva'avur zot shalacheti aleykhem et-timotios beni haahuv vehaneeman baadon vehu yazekir lakhem et-derakhay bamashicha kaasher melamed anokhi bekhal-maqom bekhal-qehila uqehila
hen-yesh mitenaseim keilu lo-avo aleykhem
aval bo avo aleykhem bizeman qarov im-yiretse yeho velo et-diverey hamitegaim eda'a ki im-et-gevuratam
ki lo bidevar sefatayim tikon malekhut haelohim ki im-bagevura
umah-atem rotsim heavo aleykhem bashevet im beahava uverucha 'anava
haqol nishema' bekhal-maqom shezenut beyneykhem uzenut asher eyn kamoha bagoyim 'ad-sheyiqach ish et-eshet aviv
veatem mitegaim tachat asher titeabalu lehasir miqirebekhem 'ose hama'ase haze
veanokhi harachoq mikem begufi veqarov beruchi kevar daneti keilu hayiti etselekhem 'al-haish asher-'asa kadavar haze
beshem adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha behiqahelekhem yachad veruchi itekhem 'im-gevurat adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
limesor et-haish hahu lasatan leabed et-habasar lema'an yivasha' harucha beyom haadon yeshu'a
lo-tov hitehalelekhem halo yeda'etem ki me'at seor mechamets et-kal-ha'isa
ba'aru et-haseor hayashan lema'an tiheyu 'isa chadasha halo lechem matsot atem ki gam-lanu fisechenu hanizebach ba'adenu hu hamashicha
'al-ken nachogah-na hechag lo-viseor yashan velo-viseor ra'a varesha' ki im-bematsot hatom vehaemet
kataveti lakhem baigeret shel tite'aravu 'im-hazonim
veeyn-da'eti 'al-hazonim ba'olam o 'al-botse'ey vetsa' vegazelanim ve'ovedey elilim ki im-ken sofekhem latset min-ha'olam
akhe-zot kataveti lakhem levileti hite'arev 'im-mi sheniqera ach vehu zone o-votse'a betsa' o-'oved elilim o megadef o sove o gazelan veaf lo leekhol 'im-haish asher kaze
ki mah-li lishepot et-asher bachuts halo tishepetu et asher babayit
vaasher bachuts haelohim yishepetem veatem teva'aru et-hara' miqirebekhem
hayariv ish mikem 'im-re'ehu veyazid lehavi dino lefeney haresha'im velo lifeney haqedshim
halo yeda'etem ki haqedosim yadinu et-ha'olam veim-ha'olam yidon 'al-yedekhem halo reuyim atem ladin dinim qalim
halo yeda'etem ki nadin din-hamaleakhim af ki-diney mamonot
veatem kesheyesh-lakhem diney mamonot moshivim atem et-hanimeas baqahal leshofetim 'aleykhem
levashetekhem ani omer et-zot hakhi eyn bakhem chakham yode'a lehokhicha beyn ish leachiv
ki ach ba ladin 'im-achiv uva lifeney veli-maaminim
af-zot yerida hi lakhem shetarivu ze 'im-ze velama lo tivecharu liheyot min-ha'aluvim veeynam 'olevim umin-ha'ashuqim veeynam 'osheqim
aval 'olevim atem ve'sheqim af et-acheykhem
halo yeda'etem ki haresha'im lo yireshu et-malekhut haelohim al-tasiu nafeshoteykhem lo hazonim lo 'ovedey elilim lo hamenaafim velo haqedeshim velo hashokhevim et-zakhar
lo haganavim velo-votse'ey vetsa' lo hasoveim velo hamegadefim velo hagazelanim kal-ele lo yireshu et-malekhut haelohim
vekhaele lefanim hayu miqetsatekhem aval ruchatsetem aval qudashetem aval hatsedaqetem beshem haadon yeshu'a uverucha eloheynu
hakol reshut li aval lo khal-davar mo'il hakol reshut li aval lo yesha'ebedeni davar
hamaakhal lakeres vehakeres lamaakhal vehaelohim et-ze veet-ze yekhale vehaguf al-yehi lazenut ki im-laadon vehaadon laguf
vehaelohim he'ir gam et-adoneynu veya'ir gam-etekhem bigevurato
halo yeda'etem ki gufoteykhem evarey hamashicha hema haeqach et-evarey hamashicha vee'ese otam leevarey zona chalila
o halo yeda'etem ki hadaveq bazona guf echad hu 'imah ki hakatuv omer vehayu sheneyhem levasar echad
aval hadaveq baadon rucha echad hu 'imo
rachaqu min-hazenut kal-chete asher-yecheta haadam michuts legufo hu vehazone chote be'etsem gufo
o halo-yeda'etem ki gufekhem hu heykhal rucha haqodesh hashokhen beqirebekhem asher haya lakhem meet haelohim velo-shelakhem atem
ki bimechir niqeneytem 'al-ken kabedu et-haelohim begufekhem uveruchakhem asher lelohim hema
ule'ineyan asher ketavetem elay hine tov leadam shel yiga' beisha
akh mipeney hazenut tehi lekhal-ish isheto vihi lekhal-isha ba'elah
haish yehi yotse yedey chovato 'im isheto ukhemo-khen haisha 'im ba'elah
haisha eyn gufah bireshutah ela bireshut ba'elah ukhemo-khen haish eyn gufo bireshuto ela bireshut isheto
al-tiparedu ze mize ki im mida'at sheneykhem lefi sha'a la'amod beta'anit u vitefila vetashuvu vetiteachadu pen-yenase etekhem hasatan biferitsutekhem
vaani omer zot bederekh reshut velo bederekh mitseva
ki mi yiten vehaya khal-adam kamoni aval kal-adam yesh-lo matenato meet haelohim ze bekho veze vekho
veel-hapenuyim veel-haalemanot omer ani ki-tov lahem la'amod kakha kemo gam-ani
akh im-lo yukhelu likhebsh et-yitseram yiseu ki-tovim nisuin meish lahut achar 'avera
ve'al-hanesoim ani metsave velo me'atsemi ki im-mida'at haadon shel-tifersh isha miba'elah
veim-parsh tiferos mimenu teshev belo ish o titeratse leva'elah veish al-yeshalach et-isheto
veel-haacherim omer ani shel mida'at haadon ki-tiheye leach isha asher eynena maamina uretsonah sheta'amod 'imo al-yeshalechena
veeshet ish asher eynenu maamin uretsono sheyeshev 'imah al-ta'azevenu
ki haish asher eynenu maamin yiqadesh baisha vehaisha asher eynena maamina tiqadesh baish sheim-lo khen hadavar beneykhem temeim ve'ata qedoshim hema
umi sheeynenu maamin im ba lifersh yifersh vehaach o haachot eynam zequqim laele vaanachenu leshalom qeraanu haelohim
ki mah-tede'i at haisha im-toshi'i et-haish umah-teda' ata haish im-toshi'a et-haisha
raq yitehalekh kal-ish kefi mah-shechalaq lo haelohim ukhefi mah-sheqara oto haadon vekhen-metaqen ani bekhal-haqehilot
im-nimol hameqora al-yimeshokh lo 'arela veim-'arel hu al-yimol
eyn-hamila nechesheva veeyn-ha'arela necheshava ki im-lishemor mitseot haelohim
ish ish bemishemareto shemitokhah niqera bah ya'amod
im-niqereta veata 'eved 'al-yera' be'eynekha ela im-tasig yadekha latset lachafeshi bechar baze
ki-haqaru vaadon biheyoto 'eved meshucharar hu laadon vekhen haqaru biheyoto chafeshi 'eved hu lamashicha
bimechir niqeneytem al-tiheyu 'avadim liveney-adam
achay ish ish bamishemeret shemitokhah niqera bah ya'amod lifeney haelohim
ve'al-devar habetulot eyn-li mitseva mipi haadon raq achave da'eti acharey asher-chanani haadon liheyot neeman
vaani omer ki-tov laadam mipeney hatsara haqerova ki-tov lo la'amod kakh
im-zaquq ata leisha al-tevaqesh lehipater veim-nifetareta al-tevaqesh isha
vegam ki-tiqach isha eyn bekha chete vehabetula ki-tiheye leish eyn bah chete aval yevoum tsarot bivesaram vaani chas 'aleykhem
vezot ani omer achay ki hasha'a dechuqa me'ata 'al-ken yiheyu hanesuim keilu eyn-lahem nashim
vehabokhim keeynam bokhim vehasemechim keeynam semechim vehaqonim keilu eyn-qineyan beyadam
vehanehenim min-ha'olam haze keilu eyn lahem hanaa mimenu ki ta'avor tsurat ha'olam haze
vaani retsoni shel tiheyu niteradim mi sheeyn-lo isha tarud baasher laadon eykh yitav be'eyney haadon
uva'al isha tarud bechefetsey ha'olam eykh yitav be'eyney haisha veeyn libo tamim
veisha fenuya uvetula teruda baasher laadon veliheyot qedosha gam begufah gam beruchah uve'ulat ba'al teruda hi bechefetsey ha'olam shetitav be'eyney va'elah
vekhen ani omer letov lakhem velo lehashelikh pach 'aleykhem ki im-lehanehaga tova ulema'an tiheyu nekhonim tamid liqerat haadon beeyn ma'etsor
vekhi-yomar ish shehu 'ose bevito habetula shel khehogen im-ya'avor 'aleyha pireqah udevar tsorekh hu az ya'ase lah kiretsono eyn bo chete yasiena
umi shehu nakhon belibo veeynenu mukherach ki im-yakhol la'asot kiretsono vegamar belibo lishemor et bito habetula tov hu 'ose
lakhen hamasi otah 'ose tov vaasher eynenu masi 'ose tov mimenu
haisha zequqa leva'elah min-hatora kal-zeman shehu chay ukheshemet ba'elah muteret hi lehinase lemi shetiretse uvilevad shetiheye vaadon
veashereyha im-ta'amod penuya zot da'eti veomar ki rucha elohim gam-bi
ve'al-devar zivechey haelilim yada'enu shekulanu yesh-lanu da'at hada'at tagebiha lev vehaahava hi habona
haomer shehu yode'a davar 'odenu lo-yada' kaasher rauy lo
aval haohev et-haelohim hu noda' lo
ve'al-devar akhilat zivechey haeelilim yada'enu ki-eyn elil ba'olam veeyn elohim bileti echad
veaf ki-yesh mi sheniqeraim elohim beyn-bashamayim beyn-baarets kaasher yesh elohim rabim vaadonim rabim
amenam lanu raq-el echad haav asher hakol mimenu vaanachenu elayv veadon echad yeshu'a hamashicha asher hakol 'al-yado vaanachenu 'al-yado
akh lo vekhulam hada'at ki yesh zokherim 'od et-haelil veokhelim keekhol zevach elil velibam hechalush yitegaal
vehamaakhal lo yeqarev otanu lelohim ki im-nokhal eyn-lanu yiteron veim-lo nokhal lo nigare'a
aval hizaheru pen-yiheye oto harisheyon shelakhem lemikheshol lachalashim
ki haroe otekha asher lekha hada'at mesev beveyt elilim halo hachalash ya'oz berucho leekhol mizivechey elilim
veyovad 'al-yedey da'etekha achikha hachalash asher lema'ano met hamashicha
veim-kakha techeteu laacheykhem vetakheivu et-rucham hechalush lamashicha atem choteim
'al-ken im-maakhali makheshil et-achi lo-okhal basar le'olam pen-akheshil et-achi
thalo shalicha anokhi halo chafeshi anokhi halo raiti et-yeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu halo pa'oli atem baadoneynu
veim-eyneni shalicha laacherim lakhem shalicha ani ki chotam shelichuti atem baadoneynu
ukheneged hadanim oti ani omer
haeyn reshut beyadenu leekhol velishetot
haaeyn reshut beyadenu leholikh 'imanu achot leisha kashelichim haacherim vekhaachey haadon ukhemo kheyfa
im-li levadi ulevar-naba lo nitena reshut lachadol la'asot melakha
mi yatsa vatsava ufarenaseto 'alayv mi nata' kerem velo yokhal et-pireyo mi ro'e 'eder umechalev ha'eder lo yokhal
hakhederekh beney adam ani medaber kazot halo gam-hatora omeret ken
ki khatuv betorat mshe lo-tachesom shor bedisho
halashevarim choshesh haelohim o raq-lema'anenu medaber akhen lema'anenu nikhetav ki hachoresh yacharos eley-tiqeva vehadash yadush eley-tiqeva laqachat cheleqo vatiqeva
im-zara'enu vakhem 'ineyeney harucha hadavar gadol hu sheniqetsor mikem 'ineyeney habasar
veim laacherim yesh reshut 'aleykhem halo yoter lanu aval lo 'asinu kareshut hazot ki im-savalenu et-hakol levileti-som ma'etsor livesorat hamashicha
halo yeda'etem ki 'ovedey 'avodat haqodesh okhelim min-haqodashim umesharatey hamizebecha loqechim cheleqam bamizebecha
ken tiqen adoneynu gam-hu sheyicheyu hamevaserim min-habesora
veanokhi lo 'asiti keachat meele vegam lo-khataveti zot lema'an ye'aseh-li ken ki-tov li hamavet measher yasim ish et-tifeareti lariq
im-avaser et-habesora eyn-li lehitepaer ki-hachova mutelet 'alay veoy li im-lo avaser
ki im-biretsoni e'ese yiheyeh-li sakhar veim-shel viretsoni pequdat mishemareti hi
ve'ata mah-sekhari halo sheavaser besorat hamashicha belo-mechir levileti hishetamesh lahanaat 'atsemi bareshut hanitenah-li babesora
ki biheyoti chafeshi mikol 'asiti 'atsemi 'eved lekhal-adam liqenot et-harabim
vaehi layehudim kihudi liqenot hayehudim asher hem tachat hatora lahem hayiti kemi shetachat hatora af ki-ani eyneni tachat hatora lema'an qenot otam shehem tachat hatora
leotam sheeyn lahem tora hayiti kemi sheeyn lo tora af 'al-pi sheeyneni belo-torat elohim ki-torat hamashicha torati lema'an qenot otam sheeyn lahem tora
velachalashim hayiti khechalash liqenot et-hachalashim hakol lekhulam niheyeyti lema'an oshi'a achadim 'al kal-panim
veet-zot ani 'ose ba'avur habesora lema'an yiheye cheleqi bah
halo yeda'etem ki-haratsim baitsetadeyon kulam ratsim veechad yizeke bisekhar hanitsachon ken rutsu lema'an tizeku vo
vekhal-ha'omed lehitegoshesh yinazer mikal-davar hema laqachat keter nifesad vaanachenu laqachat keter asher eynenu nifesad
lakhen hineni rats lo kemo vachashekha hineni nilecham lo keholem rucha
ki im-adake et-gufi vaasha'ebedenu shel-eheye ani haqore laacherim neelach be'atsemi
velo akhached mikem echay sheavoteynu hayu khulam tachat he'anan vekhulam 'averu betokh hayam
vekhulam nitebelu lemshe be'anan uvayam
vekhulam akhelu maakhal echad ruchani
vekhulam shatu masheqe echad ruchani ki shatu min-hatsur haruchani haholekh 'imahem vehatsur hahu hamashicha
aval rubam lo ratsa vam haelohim ufigereyhem nafelu vamidebar
vekhal-zot hayetah-lanu lemofet levileti hiteaot lera'a kaasher hiteauu gam-hema
velo tiheyu 'ovedey elilim kaasher hayu miqetsatam kemo shekatuv vayeshev ha'am leekhol veshato vayaqumu letsacheq
velo-niheye zonim kaasher zanu miqetsatam vayipelu beyom echad shelosha ve'eserim elef ish
velo-nenase et-yeho kaasher nisuhu miqetsatam vayeabedum hanechashim
gam-lo talinu kaasher hilinu miqetsatam vayamutu beyad hamashechit
kal-zot metsaatam liheyot lemofet vatikatev lemusar lanu asher-higi'u eleynu qitsey 'olamim
lakhen haomer benafesho ani 'omed yere pen-yipol
'adayin lo-va 'aleykhem nisayon bileti kederekh beney-adam ki-neeman hu haelohim asher lo yanicha lenasot etekhem yoter 'al kochakhem ki im-yiten 'im-hanisayon gam-acharito kedey shetukhelu seet
'al-ken chavivay rachaqu me'avodat elilim
kedaber el-nevonim ani medaber veatem binu et asher omar
kos shel-berakha asher anachenu mevarakhim 'alayv halo hu mechaber otanu ledamo shel-hamashicha vehalechem asher anachenu votse'im halo hu mechaber otanu legufo shel-hamashicha
ki-lechem echad hu lakhen guf echad anachenu harabim mipeney secheleq lekhulanu balechem haechad
habitu el-yiserael shelefi habasar halo okheley hazevachim chaverey hamizebecha hema
ve'ata ma omar hayesh mamash baelil im-yesh mamash bezivechey elilim
ela mah-sheyizebechu hagoyim lashedim hem zovechim velo lelohim vaani eyn retsoni shetiheyu chaverim lashedim
lo tukhelu lishetot kos adoneynu vekhos hashedim yachad velo yiheye cheleq lakhem beshulechan adoneynu uveshulechan hashedim
hana'ez lehaqeni et-adoneynu hakhi chazaqim anachenu mimenu
hakol reshut li aval lo khal-davar mo'il hakol reshut li aval lo khal-davar bone
ish al-yevaqesh davar le'atsemo ki im-lere'ehu
kal-hanimekar bashuq oto tokhelu veal-tacheqeru mipeney mikheshol halev
ki layeho haarets umeloah
veim-yiqera etekhem ish measher eynam maaminim uretsonekhem lalekhet elayv akhol tokhelu mikol asher-yasimu lifeneykhem veal-tacheqeru mipeney mikheshol halev
vekhi-yomar lakhem ish ze hu zevach elilim al-tokhelu mipeney oto hamodi'a umipeney mikheshol halev ki layeho haarets umeloah
vehalev sheani omer lo libekha ki im-lev re'ekha ki lamah-ze tidon cheruti 'al-yedey lev haacher
veim-okhel ani biverakha lama yetse li shem ra' 'al-hadavar sheani mevarekh 'alayv
lakhen im tokhelu veim-tishetu o-ta'aso davar 'aso hakol likhevod elohim
veal-titenu mikheshol lo layehudim velo layevanim velo liqehilat elohim
kaasher gam-anokhi mevaqesh liheyot ratsuy lakol bakol velo avaqesh to'elet 'atsemi ki-im to'elet harabim lema'an yivashe'u
lekhu be'iqevotay kaasher gam-ani holekh be'iqevot hamashicha
ve'al-zot ani meshabecha etekhem echay shezekharetem oti bakol lishemor et-haqabalot kaasher masareti lakhem
uretsoni shetiheyu yode'im sherosh kal-ish hamashicha verosh haisha haish verosh hamashicha hu haelohim
kal-ish asher yitepalel o yitenabe verosho mekhuse menavel hu et-rosho
vekhal-isha asher titepalel o titenabe veroshah paru'a et-roshah hi menavalet ki shava hi limegulacha
ki haisha im-lo titekase gam titegalach veim-bizayon hu laisha lagoz o legalecha et-se'arah titekase
amenam haish eynenu chayav lekhasot et-rosho ki hu tselem elohim ukhevodo vehaisha hi kevod haish
ki eyn-haish min-haisha ki im-haisha min-haish
gam-lo-nivera haish ba'avur haisha ki im-haisha ba'avur haish
'al-ken haisha chayevet liheyot ot mishema'etah 'al-roshah ba'avur hamaleakhim
avaal eyn haish belo isha veeyn haisha belo ish baadon
ki kaasher haisha min-haish ken gam-haish 'al-yedey haisha vekhal-ele meelohim
shifetu-na venafeshekhem hanaava leisha lehitepalel el-haelohim veroshah megula
vahalo tilemedu minohag sheba'olam ki ish asher yegadel pera' se'ar rosho cherepa hi lo
aval haisha ki tegadel se'arah peer hu lah ki-nitan lah hase'ar letsanif
veim-yeehav ish lariv lo zu darekenu velo derekh qehilot haelohim
vehine betsaoti et-zot lo ukhal leshabecha etekhem 'al-asher teasefu yachad lo letova ki im-lera'a
ki shama'eti sheyesh machaloqot beyneykhem keshetiva'adu vaqahal umiqetsat hadavar ani maamin
ki kitot tserikhot liheyot beyneykhem lema'an yivade'u haneemanim shebakhem
ve'ata kaasher teasefu yachad eyn-ze leekhol se'udato shel-haadon
ki khal-echad maqedim laqachat se'udato besha'at haakhila veze yire'av veze yishetakar
hakhi eyn lakhem batim leekhol vezishetot o hatavuzu et-qehal elohim utevayeshu et-mi sheeyn-lo ma omar lakhem ha'al-zot ashabecha etekhem eyneni meshabecha
ki-khen qibaleti ani min-haadon umasareti lakhem ki haadon yeshu'a balayela asher-nimesar bo laqach et-halachem
vayevarekh vayivetsa' vayomar qechu ikhelu ze gufi hanivetsa' ba'adekhem 'aso-zot lezikheri
ukhemo-khen et-hakos achar hase'uda vayomar hakos hazot hi haberit hachadasha bedami 'aso-zot lezikheri bekhal-zeman shetishetu
ki bekhal-zeman shetokhelu et-halechem haze vetishetu et-hakos hazot hazeker tazekiru et-mot adoneynu 'ad ki yavo
lakhen mi sheyokhal min-halechem haze o-yishete mikos haadon shel kharauy yeesham leguf adoneynu uledamo
yivechan haish et-nafesho veaz yokhal min-halechem veyishete min-hakos
ki haokhel vehashote shel kharauy okhel veshote din lenafesho lefi shel-hifela et-guf haadon
bigelal hadavar haze yesh-bakhem cholim vechalashim rabim veharebe yashenu hamavet
ki im-nivechan et-nafeshenu lo niheye nidonim
ukhesheanu nidonim nivaser 'al-yad haadon kedey shel nechuyav 'im-ha'olam
'al-ken achay behiva'edekhem yachad leekhol hametinu ze laze
vekhi-yire'av ish yokhal beveyto pen-tiva'adu leashema veyeter hadevarim ataqen bevoi
uve'ineyan matenot harucha echay lo-akhached mikem davar
halo yeda'etem ki lefanim goyim heyitem veacharey haelilim hailemim huvaletem vegam nimeshakhetem
lakhen odi' etekhem ki eyn ish dover berucha elohim veyomar leyeshu'a cherem vegam lo yiqera ish leyeshu'a adon bileti im-berucha haqodesh
vehamatanot shonot aval echad hu harucha
veshonim hashimushim veechad hu haadon
vehape'ulot shonot aval haelohim echad vehu hapo'el et-hakol bakol
ulekhal-ish vaish nitena hitegalut harucha leho'il
ki haechad nitan-lo 'al-yedey harucha dibur hachakhema uleachar dibur hada'at kefi harucha hahu
leacher haemuna barucha hahu uleacher matenot harefuot barucha hahu
uleacher life'ol gevurot uleacher nevua uleacher lehavechin beyn haruchot uleacher miney leshonot uleacher biur leshonot
vekhal-ele yife'al harucha haechad hahu hacholeq leish kiretsono
ki kaasher haguf echad uvo evarim harebe vekhal-evarey haguf af ki-rabim hem kulam guf echad ken gam hamashicha
ki berucha echad nitebalenu khulanu leguf echad im-yehudim veim-yevanim im-'avadim veim-beney chorin vekhulanu lerucha echad hasheqinu
ki gam-haguf lo evar echad hu ki im-rabim
im-tomar haregel lo yad ani 'al-ken eyneni min-haguf halazot lo min-haguf hi
veim-tomar haozen lo 'ayin ani 'al-ken eyneni min-haguf halazot lo min-haguf hi
im-haguf kulo yiheye 'ayin aye hashama' veim-kulo shema' aye hareycha
ve'ata haelohim shat et-haevarim kal-echad veechad mehem baguf kefi retsono
veilu-hayu khulam evar echad aye haguf
hine rabim hem haevarim vehaguf echad
ha'ayin lo-tukhal daber el-hayad lemor lo etsetarekh lakh vegam-harosh lo-yukhal daber el-haragelayim lemor lo etsetarekh lakhen
ki lehefekh evarey haguf hanireim rafim tserikhim anu lahem beyoter
vehanireim lanu niqelim baguf otam nalebish yeter kavod vaasher levshet lanu marebim anachenu et 'edeyam
ki haevarim hahagunim asher banu eyn tsorekh latet kavod lahem vekhen mazag haelohim et haguf latet kavod yoter lagaru'a
kedey shel-tiheye machaloqet baguf ki im-yideagu khal-haevarim yachad ze laze
veim-yikheav evar echad yikheavu ito kal-haevarim veim-yekhubad evar echad yisemechu ito kal-haevarim
veatem guf hamashicha atem veevarayv kal-echad lefi cheleqo
umehem sam haelohim baqahal rishona lishelichim veshenit lineviim ushelishit limelamedim vayiten gevurot af-matenot harefuot utemikhot vehanehagot uminey leshonot
hakhulam shelichim im-kulam neviim o khulam melamedim hakhulam 'osey gevurot
halekhulam matenot refuot hakhulam medaberim bileshonot hakhulam mevaarey leshonot
veatem hishetadelu lehasig hamatanot hatovot beyoter vaani hineni more etekhem derekh na'ala 'al-kulana
im-bileshonot anashim umaleakhim adaber veeyn-bi ahava hayiti kinechshet homa o ketsiletsal teru'a
veim tiheyeh-li nevua veeda' kal-hasodot vekhal-hada'at veim tiheyeh-li emuna raba 'ad leha'etiq harim mimeqomam veeyn-bi haahava hayiti keayin
veim-achaleq et-kal-honi veim-eten et-gufi liserefa veeyn-bi haahava kal-zot lo to'ileni
haahava maarekhet-af ve'osa chased haahava lo teqane haahava lo titepaer velo titeromam
lo ta'ase devar-tifela velo-tevaqesh et asher-lah velo titemaremar velo tachashov hara'a
lo tisemach ba'avela ki 'im-haemet tisemach
et-kol tisa et-kol taamin et-kol teqave veet-kol tisebol
haahava lo-tibol le'olam aval hanevuot tibatalena vehaleshonot tikheleyna vehada'at tibatel
ki-qetsat hu sheyada'enu uqetsat hu shenibenu
ukhevo hatamim az 'avor ta'avor haqetsat
kaasher hayiti 'olel ke'olel dibareti ke'olel hagiti ke'olel chashaveti vekhaasher hayiti leish hasiroti diverey ha'olel
ki kha'et mabitim anachenu bemarea uvechidot veaz panim el-panim ka'et yode'a ani qetsato veaz kaasher noda'eti eda' af-ani
ve'ata shelash-ele ta'amodena haemuna vehatiqeva vehaahava vehagedola shebahen hi haahava
ridefu acharey haahava vehishetadelu lehasig matenot harucha uveyoter shetitenabau
ki hamedaber belashon eynenu medaber leadam ki im-lelohim ki eyn-ish shome'o uvarucha hu medaber sodot
vehamitenabe hu medaber liveney adam livenotam uleyaseram vlenachamam
hamedaber belashon bone et-nafesho vehamitenabe bone et-ha'eda
umi yiten vekhulekhem tedaberu vileshonot uveyoter ki titenabau ki gadol hamitenabe min-hamedaber bileshonot bileti im-yefaresh lema'an tibane ha'eda
ve'ata achay ki-avo aleykhem vaadaber bileshonot mah-o'il lakhem im-lo adaber aleykhem bechazon o veda'at o vinevua o vehoraa
halo mah-sheeyn bo rucha chayim venoten qol chalil o khinor im-lo yashemi'u qolot asher tukhal haozen lehavechin eykha yivada' mah-yezumar umah-yenugan
gam hashofar im-lo yiten qolo qol barur mi yechalets lamilechama
ken gam-atem im lo-totsiu vileshonekhem dibur meforaash eykha yivada' hamedubar halo tiheyu kimedaberim larucha
hen kama miney leshonot yesh ba'olam veeyn-achat mehen beli qol
lakhen im-eyneni yode'a pesher haqol eheye khelo'ez be'eyney hamedaber vehamedaber yiheye khelo'ez be'eynay
ken gam-atem lefi shemiteavim atem lekhochot ruchaniot baqeshu leha'edif bemah-sheyivene et-ha'eda
'al-ken yitepalel hamedaber belashon vegam yefarashena
ki im-etepalel belashon ruchi mitepalel vesikheli eynenu 'ose peri
ve'ata mah-e'ese etepalala veruchi veetepalala gam-besikheli azamera veruchi vaazamera gam-besikheli
ki im-tevarekh barucha eykh ya'ane mi shehu natun bimeqom hahedeyotot amen achar birekhatekha vehu eynenu yode'a ma ata omer
hen ata tevarekh karauy aval re'akha lo yibane
ode lelohay sheyoter mikulekhem ani medaber bileshonot
akhen baqahal evechar ledaber chamesh milin besikheli kedey lehorot gam et-haacherim miledaber rivavot milin belashon
achay al-tiheyu kiqetanim babina ela heyu tinoqot lara'a ushelemim babina
hen katuv batora ki-vela'agey safa uvelashon acheret adaber el-ha'am haze vegam bezot lo-avu shemo'a-li amar yeho
lakhen haleshonot lo lamaaminim hena ot ki im-limechuserey emuna aval hanevua eynena limechuserey emuna ki im-lamaaminim
vehine im-tiqahel kal-ha'eda yachad vekhulam medaberim bileshonot veyavou hedeyotot o mechuserey emuna halo yomeru shemeshuga'im atem
aval im-yitenabeu khulam uva ish mechusar emuna o hedeyot yivakhach 'al-yedey khulam veyidon 'al-yedey khulam
uvekhen yigalu ta'alumot levavo veyipol 'al-panayv veyishetachave lelhim veya'ane veyomar beemet haelohim beqirebekhem
ve'ata mah-la'asot echay behiqahelekhem yachad kal-echad veechad mikem yesh-lo mizemor yesh-lo horaa yesh-lo lashon yesh-lo chazon yesh-lo viur vekhol ye'ase lehibanotekhem
ki-yedaber ish belashon yiheyu hamedaberim shenayim shenayim o shelosha velo yoter veze achar ze veechad yefaresh
veim-eyn mefaresh az yidom baqahal vidaber lenafesho velelohim
vehaneviim hem yedaberu shenayim o shelosa vehaacherim yivechanu
vekhi nigela chazon leacher min-hayosevim sham yidom harishon
ki tukhelu lehitenabe khulekhem ze achar ze lema'an yilemedu khulam vekhulam yuzeharu
veruchot haneviim bireshut haneviim hema
ki lo elohey mevukha haelohim ki im-elohey hashalom kaasher bekhal-qehilot haqedshim
nesheykhem bakenesiot tishetoqena ki lo-nitena lahen reshut ledaber ki im-lehikane'a kaasher amera hatora
veim-chefetsan lilemod davar tishealena et-ba'eleyhen beveytan ki-cherepa hi lanashim ledaber baqahal
o hamikem yatsa devar elohim im-aleykhem levadekhem higi'a
im yomar ish shehu navi o-ish harucha bin yavin et asher-ani khotev lakhem ki-mitseot haadon hena
umi asher lo yada' al-yeda'
lakhen achay hishetadelu lehitenabe veal-tikheleu miledaber bileshonot
hakol ye'ase kahogen vekhashura
vaani mazekirekhem achay et-habeshoora asher bisareti etekhem veatem qibaletem va'amadetem bah
vegam tivashe'u vah im-tachaziqu vadavar asher bisareti etekhem raq im lo-heemanetem lashave
ki reshit kal-davar masareti lakhem mah-sheqibaleti ki-hamashicha met lekhaper 'al-chatoteynu kakatuv
veniqebar vehuqam bayom hashelishi kakatuv
venirea el-keyfa veacharayv el-sheneym he'asar
veacharey-khen nirea leyoter mechamesh meot achim keechad asher rubam 'odam bachayim umiqetsatam yashenu
veacharey-khen nirea el-ya'aqov veacharayv el-kal-hashelichim
veacharey khulam nirea gam-elay hadome lenafel
ki ani hatsa'ir bashelichim veqatoneti mehiqare shalicha ki-radafeti et-qehal haelohim
aval bechesed elohim hayiti mah-shehayiti vechasedo 'alay lo-haya lariq ki-yoter mikulam 'amaleti velo ani ki-im-chesed elohim asher 'imadi
vehine gam-ani gam-hema kakha mashemi'im vekhakha heemanetem
veim-hugad ki-huqam hamashicha min-hametim eykh yomeru anashim mikem eyn techiya lametim
im-eyn techiya lametim gam-hamashicha lo huqam
veim-hamashicha lo huqam riq shemu'atenu veriq emunatekhem
vegam-nimetsa she'edey sheqer anachenu lelohim ya'an asher-ha'idonu et-haelohim ki heqim et-hamashicha vehu lo heqimo im ken hadavar shehametim lo yaqumu
ki im-hametim lo yaqumu gam-hamashicha lo qam
veim-hamashicha lo qam hevel emunatekhem ve'odekhem bechatoteykhem
im-ken gam-hayeshenim bamashicha avadu
veim-bachayim haele bilevad botechim anachenu bamashicha amelalim mikal-adam anachenu
aval 'ata hamashicha huqam min-hametim reshit hayeshenim
ki acharey asher-ba hamavet 'al-yedey adam gam-techiyat hametim baa 'al-yedey adam
ki kaasher baadam harishon metim kulam ken yicheyu khulam bamashicha
vekhal-echad veechad besidero reshit kulam hamashicha veacharey-khen otam shehem lamashicha bevoo
veacharey khen haqets kesheyimesor et-hamalekhut lelohim haav acharey hashebito kal-misera vekhal-shaletan ugevura
ki-hu malokh yimelokh 'ad ki-yashit et-kal-oyevayv tachat ragelayv
veacharon haoyevim asher yikached hu hamavet
ki-khol shat tachat ragelayv uveamero kol hushat tachetayv barur hu shehashat kol tachetayv eynenu vakelal
vekhaasher yushat hakol tachetayv az yushat haben gam-hu tachat hashat-kol tachetayv lema'an yiheye haelohim hakol bakol
ki mah-ya'aso hanitebalim be'ad hametim im-emet hu shehametim lo-yaqumu lamah-ze yitavelu be'ad hametim
velama ze misetakenim anachenu bekhal-sha'a
bitehilatekhem asher yesh-li bamashicha yeshu'a adoneynu me'id ani 'alay im-lo met ani bekhal-yom vayom
im-kederekh kal-adam nilechameti 'im-hachayot hara'ot beefesos mah-hi to'aleti im-hametim lo yaqumu nokhela venishete ki-machar namut
al-na tate'u nafeshoteykhem cheverat anashim ra'im tashechit midot tovot
haqitsu bemeysharim veal-techetau ki-yesh anashim asher eyn-bahem da'at elohim ani omer zot levashetekhem
vekhi-yomar ish eykh yaqumu hametim ukhesheyashuvu mah-gufam
ata hasakhal hen mah-shetizera' lo yicheye bileti im-yamut
ukheshetizera' eynekha zore'a et-haguf asher yiheye ki im-garegar 'arom shel-chita o shel-achad hazera'im
vehaelohim yiten-lo guf kiretsono ulekhal-zera' vezera' et-gufo leminehu
lo khal-habasar basar echad ki min acher hu besar haadam umin acher besar habehema umin acher besar hadaga umin acher besar ha'of
veyesh gufot shebashamayim vegufot shebaarets aval acher hu kevod hagufot shebashamayim veacher hu kevod hagufot shebaarets
acher hu kevod hashemesh veacher hu kevod hayarecha veacher hu kevod hakokhavim ki-khokhav mikokhav shone lekhavod
vekhen techiyat hametim hazeri'a lekhilayon vehatequma lechayey 'ad
yizara' bevizayon veyaqum bekhavod yizara' bechulesha veyaqum bigevura
yizara' guf nafeshi veyaqum guf ruchani im-yesh guf nafeshi gam yesh guf ruchani
vekhen katuv vayehi haadam adam harishon lenefesh chaya adam haacharon lerucha mechaya
aval lo shel-harucha hi harishona ela shel-hanafesh veacharey-khen shel-harucha
haadam harishon min-haadama hu shel-'afar vehaadam hasheni hu haadon min-hashamayim
ukhemidat haechad shehu shel-'afar ken midat kal-asher shel-'afar hem ukhemidat haechad shehu shel-hashamayim ken midat kal-asher shel-hashamayim hem
vekhaasher lavashenu tselem haadam shehu shel-'afar ken nilebash gam-tselem haadam shehu shel-hashamayim
vezot ani omer achay ki-vasar vadam lo-yukhal lareshet et-malekhut haelohim vaasher yikhele lo yirash et asher lo-yikhele
hine sod agale lakhem anachenu lo khulanu nishan hamavet aval kulanu nitechalaf
berega' echad keheref 'ayin kiteqo'a hashofar haacharon ki yitaqa' bashofar vehametim yicheyu beli khilayon vaanachenu nitechalaf
ki mah-she'ata sofo lekhilayon yilebash al-kilayon umah-she'ata sofo lamut yilebash al-mavet
umah-she'ata sofo lekhilayon kesheyilebash al-kilayon umah-she'ata sofo lamavet kesheyilebash al-mavet az yavo devar-hakatuv bula' hamavet lanetsach
aye 'aqetsekha hamavet aye nitsechonekh sheol
'oqets hamavet hu hachete vekhocha hachete hi hatora
aval todot lelohim asher natan-lanu hanitsachon 'al-yedey adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
'al-ken achay chavivay hitekonanu bal-timotu veha'edifu vekhal-'et bema'ase adoneynu mipeney sheyode'im atem ki-lo lariq 'amalekhem baadoneynu
ve'al-devar gibuy hatsedaqa le'ezerat haqedoshim kaasher tiqaneti laqehilot asher begalateya ken ta'aso gam-atem
bekhal-echad bashabat ish ish mikem kaasher tasig yado yanicha etselo veyeetsor lema'an asher avo velo yiqavets 'od
vaani avo vaasher timetseu neemanim eshelach otam 'im-igerot lehavi et-nidevatekhem lirushalayim
veim-chashuv hu sheelekh gam ani iti yelekhu
vaani avo aleykhem acharey 'averi et-maqedoneya ki et-maqedoneya e'evora
veulay eshev 'imakhem yamim achadim o kal-yemey hasetav lema'an telavuni el-asher elekh shama
ki kha'et eyn retsoni sheeree etekhem ke'over betokhakhem ki-aqave lashevet etselekhem yamim im-yiten yeho
aval eshev beefesos 'ad-chag hashavu'ot
ki-nifetach li petach gadol verav-pe'alim vehamiteqomamim rabim
vekhi yavo aleykhem timotios reu-na sheyiheye 'imakhem beli fachad ki-melekhet yeho hu 'ose kamoni
'al-ken ish al-yivez oto veshalechuhu veshalom lema'an yavo elay ki achakeh-lo ani vehaachim
veapolos achinu hifeetsareti-vo lavo aleykhem 'im-haachim velo-ratsa lavo 'ata veyavo kesheya'ale veyado
shiqedu ve'imedu vaemuna hiteosashu vehitechazaqu
vekhal-divereykhem ye'aso veahava
vaavaqesha mikem achay halo yeda'etem et-beyt isetefanas shehu reshit akhaya vayitenu nafesham lesherut haqedosim
lakhen hikane'u gam-atem mipeney haanashim hahem umipeney-khal-asher ya'avod veya'amol 'imahem
vehineni samecha beviat isetefanas ufaretunatos vaakhayeqos ki hema mileu et-cheseronekhem
vayanichu et-ruchi veet-ruchakhem 'al-ken hakiru haanashim hahem
haqehilot asher beaseya shoalot lishelomekhem 'aqilas uferiseqela vegam-haqehila asher beveytam marebim lisheol lishelomekhem baadon
haachim kulam shoalim lishelomekhem shaalu leshalom ish et-re'ehu baneshiqa haqedosha
shoel lishelomekhem bikhetav yadi ani folos
mi shel yeehav et-haadon yeshu'a hamashicha yachoram maran ata
chesed yeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu yehi 'imakhem
veahavati et-kulekhem bamashicha yeshu'a amen ﻿
